text.message: As far as being soloed that early
Nah man....you read the game very well
setup is great, but the 9s going crazy
And green reads the game very well
great mono, just hurt me and not at all red...
you read the game very well blue as well
If green has a Vp, it’s over
red you will win, dont sweat it
I wish. I’ve lost a lot of games with leads
blue watch out, red can go through the 9 6
Get you to 9 while I’m at 8. I got a Vp and knight
I’m not. I played my rb to show I don’t have VPs lol
Yeah but you have a YOP
Unless you didn’t want to go above 7
blue has the VPs i guess
He must have the VPs then but I doubt you’re telling the truth
And you both know who the other is
I mean it doesn’t matter to me since I’m robbing the 5 ore anyway
Ok so blue has 4 VPs then lol
Yeah that was a bad block
But we'll...green reads the game better
